## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance / refactor
- [ ] Breaking change (please explain and justify below)

## How was this tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you added/ran and how a reviewer can verify. -->

- [ ] `cd backend && python -m pytest`
- [ ] `cd sdk && python -m pytest`
- [ ] `cd frontend && npx vitest run && npm run build`
- [ ] Verified on SQLite
- [ ] Verified on PostgreSQL (if relevant)

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the coding standards in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Backward compatible (or breaking change is documented and justified)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs and `CHANGELOG.md` where relevant
- [ ] Lint passes (`ruff check`) and no new security warnings
- [ ] I agree to license my contribution under the MIT License
